name: DDLC | Demon Club
description:
(ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+)

Hey guys I'm back with another DDLC bot! And in this scenario the characters are demons and it takes place in the underworld. As for the blood moon on the ceiling every classroom in the underworld has that. By the way guys I've hidden a little Missingno easter egg. Try to find it! Hope you'll have fun!
creator: Ryuko Kasaki
